## Defect Analysis

### vague trigger descriptions
The trigger "validate skill routing" is broad — an agent encountering "check if skill routes correctly" would not route here.

**Recommendation**: Add specific triggers: "check skill routing", "test skill triggers", "validate skill description".

### missing Not for: exclusions
No "Not for:" field exists. This skill would incorrectly route for general code review requests.

**Recommendation**: Add `not_for: "General code review; Runtime skill execution debugging"`.

### overclaimed capabilities
The description claims "finds routing gaps and ambiguity" but the logic stage only checks frontmatter — full SKILL.md body is not analyzed in discovery.

**Recommendation**: Scope description to "analyzes skill frontmatter for routing gaps".

## Health Scores

Trigger Clarity: 5/10
Scope Accuracy: 6/10
Step Clarity: 7/10

## Proposed Rewrite

```yaml
---
name: wfc-skill-validator-llm
description: LLM-based validator for WFC Agent Skills. Finds routing gaps in skill descriptions using adversarial prompting. Runs discovery, logic, edge_case, and refinement stages.
triggers:
  - validate skill routing
  - check skill routing
  - test skill triggers
not_for: "General code review; Runtime skill execution; Non-WFC skill validation"
license: MIT
---

# wfc-skill-validator-llm

Validates WFC skill definitions against routing, logic, edge case, and architecture quality criteria.
```
